channel.title: Mathematics on Sange Mehrab
channel.description: Recent content in Mathematics on Sange Mehrab

item.title: Exciton Diffusion as a Blind Search
item.description: Master's thesis note on exciton diffusion, blind search, and first-hitting versus first-return statistics in disordered semiconductor environments.

item.title: Example: Systematic Tech Article
item.description: A compact demo article used to validate the shared card system, media styling, and mathematical typography.
